title: Poecilopteris punctulata

This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The bioactive constituents of Poecilopteris punctulata include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
